headline: Adapter Pattern
description: Converts interface of a class into another interface clients expect. Lets incompatible interfaces work together. Object adapter (composition) preferred over class adapter (inheritance).

citation.name: Design Patterns: Elements of Reusable Object-Oriented Software (30th Anniversary Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Gamma E., Helm R., Johnson R., Vlissides J.

citation.name: Software Architecture Patterns in 2025: Microservices to Modular Monoliths
citation.author: multiple
